task_completion.description: Navigate the map to the target coordinates (58.0°N, 19.5°E).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QField map is centered on or shows the Baltic Sea area around Gotland island.

task_completion.description: Identify the nearest capital city available on the map.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent views or measures the distance to nearby capital points on the map, specifically identifying Riga as the closest available capital.

task_completion.description: Initiate point feature creation at the target coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QField 'add feature' mode is active with the crosshairs positioned at approximately 58.0°N, 19.5°E on Gotland.

task_completion.description: Enter the site name in the feature attributes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Relay Survey Site' is typed into a name-related field (such as observer_name) in the QField attribute form.

task_completion.description: Enter the nearest capital note in the feature attributes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Nearest capital: Riga' is typed into a notes-related field (such as location) in the QField attribute form.

integrity.description: The agent used the QField application GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the QField Android app interface, not terminal SQLite commands or Python scripts.

integrity.description: The agent derived the nearest capital from the provided map data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent enters 'Riga' instead of 'Stockholm', proving it looked at the actual truncated dataset rather than relying on external LLM geographic knowledge.

integrity.description: The agent did not modify the evaluation scripts to bypass verification.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing editing of verifier.py or setup_task.sh.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target coordinates are 58.0°N, 19.5°E (Gotland). While Stockholm is geographically the closest capital, the provided 'world_capitals' layer is truncated and does not contain Sweden. The nearest capital actually present on the map is Riga (Latvia). Therefore, the correct note entry must be 'Nearest capital: Riga'. The agent must enter 'Relay Survey Site' as the name and 'Nearest capital: Riga' in the feature attributes form. Note that the actual layer schema has fields like 'observer_name' and 'location' instead of 'Name' and 'Notes', so accept the values if entered into the available text fields.
